name: Suspicious Svchost Process Detected
description: Detection of a suspicious `svchost.exe` process that is not a child of `services.exe`. This is a strong indicator of an adversary attempting to masquerade as a legitimate system process to evade security defenses and establish persistence.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious process, **`svchost.exe`**, was launched by an unexpected parent process, **{parent_image}**. This is a strong indicator of **Masquerading** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1036.005**) and an attempt at **Defense Evasion**. Legitimate `svchost.exe` processes should almost always be a child of `services.exe`. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The name of the parent process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
